name: DeepSeek-Coder-V2 236B
archDisplay: MoE transformer, 236B total / 21B active — DeepSeekMoE + MLA, further pretrained from a DeepSeek-V2 checkpoint on 6T additional code/math tokens
note: Reached GPT-4-Turbo-level coding (90.2 HumanEval) while expanding language support from 86 to 338 programming languages at 128K context.
tpsNote: 236B total params exceed a single RTX 4090's 24GB even at 4-bit; requires multi-GPU or CPU/RAM offload
